extract: Giga Drain (Japanese: ギガドレイン Giga Drain) is a damage-dealing Grass-type move introduced in Generation II. It is: TM19 from Generation II to Generation IV, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM28 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM111 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM042 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. It is the strongest in a line of three Grass-type HP draining attacks, the other two being Absorb and Mega Drain.
